creator: admin@ifconfig.com.ua
text:
Created attachment 148393
Renamed port rejik for version squid 3.4

Rejik is a squid redirector used for blocking unwanted content basing on URLs and Perl Compatible Regular Expressions (http://www.pcre.org/).

WWW: http://www.rejik.ru/

______________
Overview

www/rejik deleted from ports tree.
I fix it, and renamed because for now
For squid 3.3 used redirector-3.2.11.tgz
For squid 3.4 used redirector-3.2.11_squid_3.4.tgz

So, i rename rejik to rejik-sq33
And copy and modify version for squid 3.4 with name of port rejik-sq34

This version for squid 3.4

* Renamed to rejik-sq33
* Fork rejik-sq33 (for squid-3.4 and above) in port rejik-sq34
* Removed deprecated master site (NX Domain)
* Redefine dependencies (for squid before version 3.4)
